title: Milktopia Queso Fritters
description: Crispy Italian-inspired fritters filled with milktopia and queso, perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine milktopia and queso.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, Italian seasoning, salt, and black pepper.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the milktopia-queso mixture and mix until well combined.
4. Using a cookie scoop or spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into a shallow dish filled with bread crumbs.
5. Roll each ball between your hands to shape into a ball and then flatten slightly.
6. Heat about 1/2 inch of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
7. When the oil is hot, add a few fritters to the skillet (do not overcrowd).
8. Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
9. Remove the fritters from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
